original_sql_excerpt: UPDATE TAXLOT_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT t SET t.end_dt = TO_DATE('#SSDS.SSDS_BATCH_DT','YYYYMMDD') WHERE t.end_dt = TO_DATE('29991231','YYYYMMDD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TAXLOT_STG_OWNER.OPN_TAX_LOTS_NONBKR_TGT s WHERE t.CCAL_PD_ID = s.CCAL_PD_ID AND t.AR_ID = s.AR_ID AND t.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM = s.TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM AND trunc(t.TXN_INTT_DT) = trunc(s.TXN_INIT_DT) )
